summary: Session 14 full chain: fresh 8-item audit driven by live incident forensics, 7 shipped + 1 diagnosed-and-escalated, suite 131 -> 149.
changes: CI + Pages deploy defended against the proven Playwright install hang (cache, bounded install with retry, smoke watchdog).
Weekly scheduled deep realism sweep workflow added with its own 90-minute budget (non-blocking).
Rivalry DNA surfaced in game UI: schedule rivalry strip + RIVALRY WEEK sim-watch banner.
Season Epilogue ritual appended to the Season Review modal (arc verdicts, records, fan pulse, deterministic quote).
Shareable VSFC1 challenge codes: copy on speedrun panel, accept on setup, FNV-1a checksum.
Save integrity stamps on browser saves and gist sync payloads, verified on load/import.
Beta feedback flow: prefilled GitHub issue with game context, opt-in analytics digest.
Public-site 403 root-caused: Cloudflare-proxied apex blocks GitHub ACME; founder runbook written.
followUp: Push and verify the CI matrix + Pages deploy with the install defenses in Actions.
After Cloudflare runbook is applied, confirm cert reissue and public game URL reachability.
Next-wave audit candidates: press-conference narrative cross-refs, fan-sentiment hot-seat loop.
